summary: WIN-034 verdict reclassification Unfalsifiable → Self-Contradicted (structural-coherence pattern 2). Three independent SC dimensions on the dome's own commitments: (1) ground-based radio astronomy at copper-opaque GHz frequencies; (2) WIN-048 CMB observability at 160 GHz (copper skin depth ~0.2 μm); (3) WIN-029 Schumann frequency (dome's own H(r)=8537·exp(−r/8619) gives ~0.018 Hz, not the 7.83 Hz the copper-ceiling premise is meant to deliver). Resolves the WIN-048.c4 hole #1 latent tension (WIN-034-Unfalsifiable / WIN-048-SC-cites-WIN-034 asymmetry). EXP-295 reclassified WIN-048 on the same SC framework citing WIN-034 as the falsifying premise; this EXP closes the loop by aligning WIN-034's verdict to the SC reading already articulated in its detail_evidence. 3 find_replace patches (verdict, finding, tldr_verdict+sub_rationale combined). No detail_evidence restructuring needed. Verdict tally moves Self-Contradicted 19→20, Unfalsifiable 4→3 (test.js verdict-tally walker auto-updates the HTML legend). OPERATOR-APPROVAL GATE: ISS-1921 routing_reason explicitly states 'Analyst drafts EXP; operator approves verdict commit when it lands' — decider may apply patches but should NOT auto-close ISS-1921; leave at fixed-pending-operator-approval until operator confirms via human-note. Review class declared deep-attack (singleton); curmudgeon should treat as single-WIN verdict-change review (parallel to WIN-048.c4 c4 cycle), not as holistic batch — the class_hint='holistic' on the ISS was overridden per PROP-025 author authority (review_class_override_note in the EXP). Three test sentinels recommended in EXP test_recommendation field. Curmudgeon attack vectors and four anticipated defender pivots (biblical-exegesis-Unfalsifiable counter; three-dimensions-not-independent counter; Schumann-geometry-incomplete counter; selective-transparency counter) detailed in the EXP. Kernel of truth acknowledged: ANE solid-sky cosmology engagement is legitimate; the failure is at adoption-as-physical-engineering-spec.
